title: Discovery Bot Goes Live + Fraud Detection R&D Update
summary: ATS launches the Discovery Bot — a multi-agent AI system that surfaces real operational pain points from employees through SMS and Slack. The Fraud Detection AI research phase wraps up with promising early results.
author: Anish Tatke

sections.heading: Discovery Bot: ATS Builds Internally First
sections.body: The Discovery Bot is now live across WFG. A conversational agent named Alex reaches employees weekly via SMS and Slack, capturing six structured signals per interaction: the problem, the workaround in use, frequency, operational impact, ideal outcome, and time cost per week. A second AI agent converts that input into a structured insight report delivered directly to ATS.

sections.heading: Fraud Detection R&D — Phase One Complete
sections.body: The first phase of Fraud Detection AI research is complete. Early results show a 94% accuracy rate in identifying suspicious wire instructions before they reach the closing table. Full deployment across Agency and Direct channels is targeted for Q2 2026.
